Notice Of Motion For Order Settling And Approving Receiver'S Final Accounting, Discharging Receiver And Exonerating All Bonds
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY E. MITCHELL OF DLA PIPER, TEL. NO. 836-2570 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff MPC ANTELOPE VALLEY LLC'S motion for order settling and approving receiver's final accounting, discharging receiver and exonerating all bonds is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Appointing Receiver And For Preliminary Injunction;
Off Calendar Jun-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MPC ANTELOPE VALLEY, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER AND FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Jeffrey E. Mitchell, Esq. of DLA Piper LLP (US) 836-2570 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as plaintiff provided valid proofs of services. Upon further review, the Court granted the motion. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
